SCHEDULE
Patents andCompanies Registration [No. 4 of 2020 79
Agency
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 4 of 2020
DateofAssent:23rdOctober,2020
An Act to continue the existence of the Patents and
Companies Registration Agency and re-define its
functions; re-constitute the Board of the Agency and
provide for its functions; repeal and replace the Patents
and Companies Registration Agency Act, 2010; and
provide for matters connected with, or incidental to the
foregoing.
[26thOctober,2020
ENACTEDbytheParliamentof Zambia. Enactment
PART I
PRELIMINARYPROVISIONS
